authorship.signature: This structured visual template was analyzed, authored, and signed by Codex for reuse as an AI web design reference.

intended_use: AI web designer reference template for generating premium local-service landing pages, especially roofing, construction, home repair, remodeling, and exterior services.

design_summary.style: clean premium service website with strong photographic hero, rounded content blocks, orange conversion accents, and spacious white sections
design_summary.layout_archetype: single-page landing page with hero, service cards, process, testimonials, lead form, and footer
design_summary.primary_conversion_goal: drive quote requests and roof inspection bookings

canvas.outer_margin: 32px top and bottom on desktop, 20px mobile
canvas.shadow_style: soft, minimal, mostly used on cards and form panel

primary.name: Safety Orange
primary.usage: primary CTA buttons, active nav item, circular icons, accordion active state, small directional controls

primary_dark.name: Burnt Orange
primary_dark.usage: button hover states and footer icon emphasis

background_peach.name: Warm Peach Frame
background_peach.usage: outer page background and subtle gradient panels

surface.name: White
surface.usage: main website shell, cards, navbar, form panel

surface_soft.name: Soft Gray
surface_soft.usage: section backgrounds, service cards, footer, inactive panels

text_primary.name: Charcoal
text_primary.usage: headings, strong labels, footer logo text

blue_gray.name: Roof Sky Blue Gray
blue_gray.usage: photo tinting, hero overlay harmony, contact section atmosphere

typography.font_family_recommendation: Use a modern geometric sans-serif such as Inter, Manrope, Satoshi, or Plus Jakarta Sans.
typography.font_character: rounded, contemporary, high legibility, medium x-height

layout_structure.grid_system: 12-column desktop grid with 24px gutters; collapse to 1-column mobile with selective 2-column cards where space allows
layout_structure.visual_rhythm: alternate full-width media blocks, two-column editorial rows, card grids, and strong centered statement panels
layout_structure.image_treatment: large rounded photography with subtle dark overlays where text is placed on top; service images are cropped tightly around workers, roofs, tools, and homes
layout_structure.button_style: pill buttons, orange fill for primary actions, white or light neutral fill for secondary actions, optional arrow or phone icon
layout_structure.icon_style: small rounded orange line icons or filled orange circular icons

section_order.layout: horizontal bar inside white shell, logo left, centered nav links, CTA button right

content.logo: abstract orange roof mark plus two-line brand name

section_order.layout: large rounded rectangular hero image with oversized translucent wordmark behind foreground copy
section_order.background_image_subject: roofer working on modern metal roof under cloudy blue-gray sky
section_order.overlay: subtle dark gradient from lower left and soft atmospheric light overlay

content.headline: Shield Your Home with Sleek, Modern Roofing Solutions
content.body: Short supporting sentence about durability, style, and expert roofing work.

positioning.oversized_word: top third, spanning nearly full width
positioning.headline: lower left, max-width 520px
positioning.cta_group: below headline, horizontal on desktop and stacked on narrow mobile

section_order.layout: two-row asymmetric grid: heading and small feature blurb above image gallery cards

content.heading: Your Primary Home Deserves Top-Tier Roofing
content.small_feature: compact blurb with small circular tool image
content.left_card: pricing teaser with roof photo and orange button
content.center_card: large portfolio gallery image with overlaid label and circular arrow controls
content.right_card: light card explaining smart roofing protection with text link

section_order.grid: desktop: 3 columns with center card widest; mobile: stacked cards

section_order.layout: intro copy left, section heading right, then horizontal row of rounded service cards

content.heading: Durable, Stylish Roofing Solutions
content.intro_copy: Brief proof-oriented copy about installations, repairs, and long-term protection.

cards.title: Call Now
cards.style: orange-tinted contact card with person photo and phone pill

section_order.interaction_hint: small circular previous and next controls near heading

section_order.layout: wide rounded rectangle with warm peach-to-white gradient background

content.statement: Roofing is more than a structure - it's your home's foundation. We empower homeowners with quality craftsmanship, clear pricing, and durable solutions for lasting security and value.

section_order.typography: large centered bold paragraph, max-width about 760px

section_order.layout: three-column row: text left, tall image center, accordion stack right

content.heading: Transform Your Home with Premium Roofing
content.body: Short paragraph about expert craftsmanship, clear pricing, and durable protection.
content.image_subject: roofers installing shingles on pitched roof

section_order.layout: heading and intro left, four compact cards right
section_order.card_style: soft gray cards, orange line icons, compact body text

section_order.layout: centered heading above three equal cards

cards.image_subject: smiling woman homeowner portrait in bright home
cards.name: Jennifer Chen

section_order.card_style: rounded white cards with top portrait image, quote text, name, location, star rating

section_order.layout: wide rounded background image panel with white form card on left and contact text on right
section_order.overlay: blue-gray and warm dark gradient for contrast

content.form_heading: Book a Roof Inspection & Receive a Free Estimate

section_order.layout: four-column footer with logo/description, page links, support/legal links, map preview

content.description: Short trust statement about professional roofing service.
content.map: light map image card with orange location pin

responsive_behavior.desktop: centered white site shell with multi-column grids and full-width hero inside shell
responsive_behavior.tablet: reduce hero wordmark size, keep two-column sections where possible, wrap service cards
responsive_behavior.mobile: single-column layout, sticky or collapsed nav, hero text remains over image, cards stack vertically, form fields become one column
responsive_behavior.image_cropping: preserve worker and roof as focal points; avoid cropping heads, tools, or CTA text

avoid: oversized marketing cards unrelated to service conversion
must_include: white centered website shell on peach background
oversized translucent ROOFING word in hero
about section with image and accordion
lead capture form over roof image
footer with map preview and giant faint brand word
qwen_generation_rules.content_adaptation: Replace roofing-specific text and imagery when adapting to another trade, but keep the same section rhythm, hierarchy, card density, rounded geometry, and conversion flow.

style_rules: Photorealistic only — no illustrations, no cartoons, no AI-looking renders
Warm natural lighting, golden hour preferred for exteriors
Real workers in proper safety gear, real tools, real job sites
Location must feel authentic to the prospect's city/state
No text, logos, or watermarks burned into the image

hero_bg.prompt: Professional {prospect_category} crew working on a {prospect_services_primary} job at a {prospect_ideal_client_property_type} in {prospect_city}, {prospect_state}. Golden hour sunlight, wide-angle lens, warm tones, photorealistic. The crew wears branded safety gear. Neighborhood visible in background showing {prospect_geo_region_style} architecture. Shot from slight low angle to convey trust and scale.

intro_image.prompt: Beautiful {prospect_ideal_client_property_type} in {prospect_city}, {prospect_state} with a freshly completed {prospect_services_primary} job. Clean, professional finish. Manicured front yard, warm afternoon light, real estate photography style. {prospect_geo_region_style} architectural style. The {prospect_category} work is the clear focal point.

service_cards.slot: service cards — one per service offered
service_cards.prompt_per_service: Close-up of a professional {prospect_category} technician performing {service_name} on a {prospect_ideal_client_property_type}. Hands visible with proper tools, clean worksite, natural light. Located in {prospect_geo_region_style} setting. Photorealistic, editorial quality, tight crop on the work being done.

portfolio_before.prompt: Realistic 'before' photo of a {prospect_ideal_client_property_type} in {prospect_city} needing {prospect_services_primary} work. Visible wear, aging, or damage that a {prospect_category} professional would fix. Overcast natural light, documentary photography style. No extreme destruction — just honest wear that motivates a homeowner to call.

portfolio_after.prompt: Realistic 'after' photo of the same style {prospect_ideal_client_property_type} in {prospect_city} with a beautifully completed {prospect_services_primary} job. Bright sunny day, fresh materials, clean worksite, curb appeal transformation. Same {prospect_geo_region_style} architecture. The improvement is dramatic but believable.

testimonial_portraits.prompt: Friendly, approachable homeowner portrait in {prospect_city}, {prospect_state}. Standing near their {prospect_ideal_client_property_type} with a warm, genuine smile. Natural outdoor light, shallow depth of field, upper body shot. The person looks like a real satisfied customer of a local {prospect_category} company — not a model. Age range {portrait_age_range}, {portrait_description}.

contact_bg.prompt: Wide exterior shot of a {prospect_ideal_client_property_type} in {prospect_city}, {prospect_state} showcasing excellent {prospect_category} work against a clear sky. Slight blue-hour or late afternoon atmosphere. Shot from the street perspective showing the full property. {prospect_geo_region_style} neighborhood. Will be used as a background behind a contact form — needs clear sky area on right side for text overlay.

variable_mappings.prospect_services_primary: first/main service extracted from reviews or template defaults
variable_mappings.prospect_services: all services array extracted from reviews_data keywords + template.defaultServices
variable_mappings.prospect_ideal_client_property_type: inferred from category: roofing/fencing/landscaping → 'residential home', plumbing/hvac → 'single-family home', painting → 'home or storefront', general-contractor → 'home under renovation'
variable_mappings.prospect_geo_region_style: inferred from state: FL → 'Florida stucco and tile', TX → 'Texas ranch-style', Northeast → 'colonial or Cape Cod', Southwest → 'adobe and southwestern', Pacific NW → 'craftsman bungalow', Midwest → 'midwestern brick and siding'
variable_mappings.portrait_description: vary across 3 portraits for diversity in gender, ethnicity, and style

generation_sequence: 1. Extract prospect data from Supabase by UUID
2. Resolve all variables using prospect fields + variable_mappings
3. Generate hero_bg first (largest, sets visual tone)
4. Generate service_cards in parallel (one per service, max 4)
5. Generate portfolio_before and portfolio_after as a pair
7. Generate intro_image and contact_bg in parallel
9. Pass image paths + template JSON to qwen3.5 for HTML generation
